name: Segment

aliases.name: EventData
aliases.type: { msg : WebData Value -> msg, key : String, applicationName : String, name : String, properties : List ( String, Value ), userId : String, anonymous : Bool }

aliases.name: IdentifyData
aliases.type: { msg : WebData Value -> msg, key : String, applicationName : String, traits : List ( String, Value ), userId : String }

values.name: createIdentifyCmd
values.comment:
let
        eventData =
            let
                traits =
                    [ ( "email", Json.Encode.string "pgibbons@initech.com" )
                    , ( "name", Json.Encode.string "Peter Gibbons" )
                    ]
            in
            { msg = UpdateIdentifyReqStateMsg
            , key = "segmentKey"
            , applicationName = "myApplicationName"
            , traits = traits
            , userId = "1234"
            }
    in
    createIdentifyCmd eventData

values.name: createPageEventCmd
values.comment:
let
        eventData =
            let
                properties =
                    [ ( "title", Json.Encode.string "Welcome | Initech" )
                    , ( "url", Json.Encode.string "http://www.initech.com" )
                    ]
            in
            { msg = UpdatePageEventReqState
            , key = "segmentKey"
            , applicationName = "myApplicationName"
            , name = "Home"
            , properties = properties
            , userId = "1234"
            , anonymous = False
            }
    in
    createPageEventCmd eventData

values.name: createTrackEventCmd
values.comment:
let
        eventData =
            let
                properties =
                    [ ( "plan", Json.Encode.string "Pro Annual" )
                    , ( "accountType", Json.Encode.string "Facebook" )
                    ]
            in
            { msg = UpdateTrackEventReqState
            , key = "segmentKey"
            , applicationName = "myApplicationName"
            , name = "Registered"
            , properties = properties
            , userId = "someAnonymousId"
            , anonymous = True
            }
    in
    createTrackEventCmd eventData
